Profile hub — "Direction A" implemented

Branch feat/profile-standing-layout (stacked on polish/settings-v1-cleanup) · 2026-07-08

Before → approved mock → shipped

What changed

  • Hierarchy is now: identity + points/rank hero → one quiet stat strip → navigation.
  • The four stat tiles collapsed into one strip; MEDALS → TROPHIES (the system's one user-facing name).
  • Rarity breakdown strip removed — census detail lives in the Hangar and the Rarity reference.
  • Surfaces are iOS 26 Liquid Glass (.glassEffect) tinted to bgElevated (untinted glass washes out on the dark palette), over a backdrop with two faint radial glows.
  • The toolbar Share became the page’s one styled CTA — cyan disc, dark glyph (follow-up commit).
  • Share now goes STRAIGHT to the system share sheet (one tap — the preview-sheet detour is gone), and the shared card was redesigned in Direction B’s language: points + rank hero, a NEXT UP tier-metal progress ring, and a rarity-tinted BEST CATCH row (ProfileShareCard). The share is also an invite: challenge line + scannable tailspot.app QR on the card, and a tappable install link in the ShareLink message; profile_share_opened funnel event. The invite trophy waits for real joined-from-your-invite attribution (Spotter Pass, PLAN §9 #10).

Backlog capture

The boarding-pass concept you liked is now PLAN §9 #10 — Spotter Pass: the share/invite artboard (rank as seat, points as miles, scannable challenge code), not the profile layout.
